directions.step: Over medium heat, in a large/tall skillet, heat oil and cook minced garlic, chopped jalapeño, and oregano. Once garlic is lightly browned, add rice and toast for a few minutes, stirring occasionally. Add tomato paste and mix into the rice. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add stock and scrape up any bits stuck to the pan. Add salt, pepper, and bring to a simmer. Cover and cook about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Once rice is fully cooked, stir in shredded basil, cover, and let sit (off heat) for 10 minutes. Fluff with a fork and serve.
